content:
Hi! perfect fit for CoC! :)

Small typos: "create it's mirror version" / "replacing each digit with it's mirror equivalent." should be changed to: "create its mirror version" / "replacing each digit with its mirror equivalent."
Also maybe consider adding a pair of test with mixed string (valid + invalid digits) as your INVALID test (347) only contains invalid digits...

Thanks for your comment!
I'm trying to make more test cases. Pls wait!

Goal
* Please change "it's" to "its".

* Please format the mirror map using the multi-line monospace syntax (3 backticks before and after the block of the text), like this:
```
(some text)
(some more text)
(some more text)
```

* Please clarify what is meant by an "invalid digit".

* Please format "INVALID" as a {{constant}}.

Output
* Please format "INVALID" as a {{constant}}.

Constraints
* Please update the upper bound.

Cases
* Each test and its validator should cover the *SAME SCENARIO* scenario but with slightly different inputs and outputs (except for the INVALID cases). Please revise the cases accordingly. For example,
  • Pair 1 is simple.
  • One of the middle pairs cover [[s]] with a few leading 0s.
  • The second last pair contains long "invalid" cases.
  • The last pair contains long "valid" cases.
  (These are just examples and you should need more than 4 pairs of cases in total.)

Thanks.
Also note that the cases should be logically ordered in increasing difficulty/complexity.
Thanks for all of your comments, I will fix it right away!
I have updated my contribution. Make sure to check later
hi, you still need to change "it's" to "its". (Goal 2.)

Goal
* Please change "it's" to "its" in point 2, as pointed out by @N3l 😉

Cases
* Invalid 2 (Validator 5): Please change the input to 4 (a single invalid digit) to match Test 5.

* Long Invalids 1 (Test 6): Please change the input to 12568904. There's currently no visible test that includes 4 as an invalid digit, so we change this case for the purpose of Reverse mode.

* Long Valid 2 (Validator 7): Please remove the trailing newline from the output.

* Hard Valid (Validator 8): Please add a new pair of cases (Pair 9), and use this case as either the new test or the new validator.

* After that, create a new Hard Invalid (new Validator 8) where the input is a random integer containing all valid digits and several 3s, but no 4s and no 7s.

Thanks.
Thanks @5DN1L. I will fix it asap.
I have updated my contribution. Anything else I need to fix?
